Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Defendants CPC RESTURANT, INC., STINK, INC., DAVID BARRETT's Petition To Compel Arbitration.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Defendant's CPC RESTURANT, INC., STINK, INC., DAVID BARRETT's unopposed "petition to compel arbitration" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
